Name: Servine
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Name: Serperior ex
Ability-Effect: Attacks used by your Pokémon do 20 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
Effects: You may search your deck for up to 3 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Effects: Draw a card.

Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.
